_instructions.url: Production URL of the site, used for canonical and OG tags.
_instructions.lang: HTML lang attribute and SEO region hint.
_instructions.site_type: Publication authority: one-page | multipage | seo. Missing → seo. Invalid fails validate:data.
_instructions.seo: Default SEO metadata when a page does not provide its own.
_instructions.theme: Primary brand colors and font stack. Required: primary, accent, dark, light, body_font, heading_font. Optional additive: primary_dark, muted, surface, border (hex). Runtime CSS vars + Google Fonts load from these values.
_instructions.features: Toggle entire sections on/off without deleting JSON files.
_instructions.header_variant: Optional header visual variant: default | centered | transparent | minimal (default: default).
_instructions.footer_variant: Optional footer visual variant: default | dark | compact | multi-column (default: default).

seo.default_title: Masonry & Hardscape Contractor in Virginia Beach
seo.default_description: Trusted masonry and hardscape contractor serving Virginia Beach. Patios, retaining walls, pavers, concrete and outdoor living spaces.
